case_title: IVONEZIO GALVAO JR VS. ROBERT MUELER et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-05-2005 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOYCE LONG. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Continued To Jul-05-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/5/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Loretta Najera, CSR#5153 (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-02-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
